ksa_text: Skill in conducting data profiling to identify patterns, anomalies, and characteristics within data, including analysis of data structures and content assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-003 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.470 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.470) and is in_scope for the ISO 8000 Data Technician role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for technician-level ISO 8000 Data Technician.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.470), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NIST AI RMF signal (0.470) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual ISO 8000 Data Technician requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at technician level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.470 is market-validated for ISO 8000 Data Technician. Final decision: include.
